title: Canvas Stretched, 0.75"
description:
Pick a horizontal, vertical, or square stretched canvas and create personalized wall art to sell online or order for yourself. The premium quality 100% polyester canvas stretches over a 0.75” pinewood frame. It's the perfect base for printing your designs in crisp, vibrant colors.
.:Material: 100% polyester (canvas), 100% pinewood (frame)

.:Comes in 20 sizes

.:Horizontal, vertical and square options available

.:Assembled in the USA from globally sourced parts

.:Small QR codes on the back

.:Mounting hardware included

.:NB! Due to canvas production specifics, the design placement might shift for 1-3 mm and can stretch over the canvas edges
